sprint.goal: Fix P0 hook-breaking bugs (#972, #973), then resume Go kernel wire-up (#955). Hook path must work before Go delegation can ship.

senior.title: P0: Fix hook deny reason retry metadata (#972) + bundle essentials pack in npm (#973)
senior.note: P0 fast-track: #972 breaks all governed sessions (retry text in deny reason → Claude Code blocks all tool use). #973 compounds it (essentials pack missing → default-deny on everything). Fix both before resuming #955 Go delegation.

blockers.description: Hook deny reason includes '(attempt N/N)' — Claude Code misinterprets as blocking error, killing all tool use in governed sessions
essentials policy pack not bundled in npm — all hook invocations hit default-deny

prs.title: fix(kernel): update invariant count assertion 23→24 after no-verify-bypass
prs.note: Fixes invariant count regression. CI blocked by 2 pre-existing issues on main: (1) Prettier formatting in claude-hook.ts, (2) go-fast-path.test.ts fails in CI (passes locally — Go binary not available in CI runner).

prs.title: fix(claude-init): write hooks with full binary path (closes #964)
prs.note: Merged successfully. All CI checks passed.

regressions.test: agentguard/core/engine > createEngine > creates an engine with defaults
regressions.error: expected 24 to be 23 — invariant count assertion stale after no-verify-bypass invariant added (PR #1002)
regressions.fix: PR #1028 (open, CI blocked by pre-existing issues)

ciBlockers.impact: Blocks CI lint step for ALL PRs
ciBlockers.note: Pre-existing on main. Needs a 1-line prettier --write fix.

ciBlockers.impact: Blocks CI test step for ALL PRs
ciBlockers.note: Passes locally (Go binary available). Fails in CI (Go binary not present in runner). Test needs skip-if-no-binary guard.

coverageGaps.note: Test file exists (cli-copilot-init.test.ts) but coverage is minimal compared to claude-init (39 tests). Needs parity.
